data.title: Binance Executives Met With US Government Officials To Discuss Easing of Regulatory Supervision: Report
data.description:
Executives at Binance reportedly sat down with Treasury Department officials in March to discuss the possibility of relaxing the US government’s regulatory scrutiny of the world’s largest crypto exchange.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/04/13/binance-executives-met-with-us-government-officials-to-discuss-easing-of-regulatory-supervision-report/

data.title: Binance's CZ Denies Allegations of Money Laundering
data.description:
Zhao Changpeng of Binance refutes money laundering claims, emphasizing asset security and regulatory compliance.
source: https://coincu.com/331934-binance-cz-refutes-money-laundering-claims

data.title: Crypto Fund Manager Spots Repeat of 2020 Bear Trap in Bitcoin’s Price
data.description:
Bitcoin bears tested long-term support at $75,000 to start April, but one popular Dutch crypto fund manager and price analyst spots an opportunity to profit from the selloff.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/crypto-fund-manager-spots-repeat-of-2020-bear-trap-in-bitcoins-price/

data.title: Bitcoin’s Last Drawdown To $74,000 A ‘Healthy Correction’ — Analyst Says Bull Cycle Is Still On
data.description:
The price of Bitcoin has found its way back above the $85,000 mark, marking a huge success in the recovery from the coin’s latest slump toward $74,000. According to an on-chain analyst, this recent correction might not be as ominous as initially thought and could be part of a broader bull cycle. Can BTC Price Reach A New All-Time High In This Cycle? An analyst with the pseudonym ShayanBTC, in a Quicktake post on the CryptoQuant platform, shared fresh insights into the current Bitcoin market dynamics and the implications of the most recent price pullback. This evaluation is based on the Realized Cap of Unspent Transaction Output (UTXO) age bands, which analyzes the holding pattern of different investor cohorts
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoins-last-drawdown-to-74000-is-a-healthy-correction-analyst-says-bull-cycle-is-still-on/

data.title: Justin Sun Predicts New All-Time Highs For Tron Coin Marketcap
data.description:
Can Tron coin (TRX) make a strong comeback in Q2 2025 as the market recovers from Trump tariffs and their onslaught on risk-on assets? Tron founder and popular crypto proponent Justin Sun seems to thinks so according to his latest statement.
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/13/justin-sun-predicts-new-all-time-highs-for-tron-coin-marketcap/

data.title: A whale sold 1.56 million Fartcoin 30 minutes ago and bought 11.62 million RFC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale sold 1.56 million Fartcoins (US$1.26 million) 30 minutes ago and then bought 11.62 million RFCs. As a result, the market value of RFC may have soared to more than US$100 million in a short period of time.

data.title: Trump Family Deepens Crypto Ties With Nearly $1 Billion on the Line
data.description:
The Trump family has made substantial investments in the cryptocurrency industry. 
source: https://www.benzinga.com/markets/cryptocurrency/25/04/44779915/trump-family-deepens-crypto-ties-with-nearly-1-billion-on-the-line?utm_source=cryptopanic.com&utm_campaign=partner_feed&utm_medium=partner_feed&utm_content=site

data.title: The whale sold about 1.5 million Fartcoins and bought about 1.3 million RFCs. The current total floating loss is $30,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, a whale address liquidated about 1.5 million Fartcoins (worth about $1.2 million) and bought about 1.3 million RFCs. The overall position currently has a floating loss of about $30,000. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors should participate with caution.
Whale address: EzjWdddntbWNLFqf9qffFujAyMg4YDUYSVt4uhxAwiW7

data.title: SOL-to-ETH price ratio hits all-time high, while Vitalik hints at faster future upgrades for Ethereum
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin said he's experienced "near-zero pushback" on the idea of shipping Ethereum hard fork upgrades faster.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350654/sol-to-eth-price-ratio-hits-all-time-high-while-vitalik-hints-at-faster-future-upgrades-for-ethereum?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Musk's concept Meme coin RFC market value briefly exceeded 100 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN data, the market value of Musk's concept Meme coin RFC briefly exceeded 100 million US dollars, setting a record high.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.
